articles.title: One of the best coastal small towns in America is in Maine, according to USA Today readers
articles.description:
The publication calls it a "classic New England coastal town."

The post One of the best coastal small towns in America is in Maine, according to USA Today readers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: USA Today readers named a Maine town a top coastal destination for New England travelers.
The recognition highlights Maine's appeal, attracting Boston residents seeking weekend getaways.
Increased tourism may benefit local businesses in both Maine and Boston's travel industry.

articles.title: A Dorchester condo with city views — can you guess the price?

summary: Dorchester condo features cathedral ceilings and a private deck with city views.
